description: Production default: high investigability with density spread guarantee
selection_rule: Hard floor min_density >= tau_floor, then greedy maximize log-density spread among selected
rationale: Lowest variance (std=0.0018) and P(>=C1)=100% across 1000 bootstrap iterations. tau_floor=3500 eliminates sparse_neighborhood failures while retaining borderline-Q1 candidates for diversity. Greedy spread ensures representation across the full density range above the floor.
use_when: Comparing C1 vs C2 without density confound
Any run requiring stable, predictable investigability
